---
title: "練習：Base Rの作図"
# Purpose: Practice basic Base R plots using the plant growth data.
---

{{< include ../_extensions/r-wasm/live/_knitr.qmd >}}

植物成長データを使って、Base Rの作図を練習します。

## 課題

- 観察日と草丈の散布図を作る。
- 草丈のヒストグラムを作る。
- 処理区ごとの草丈の箱ひげ図を作る。
- 処理区ごとの平均草丈を棒グラフにする。
- 散布図に回帰直線を追加する。
- 処理区ごとの平均草丈を線で重ねる。

## ヒント

- 散布図は `plot(x, y)` です。
- 箱ひげ図は `boxplot(height_cm ~ treatment, data = plants)` です。
- 回帰直線は `abline(lm(...))` で追加できます。
- 線を重ねるときは、最初に `plot()` で土台を作り、次に `lines()` を使います。
- 凡例は `legend()` で追加できます。

## 作業用セル

```{webr}
# ここにコードを書いてみましょう
```

## 解答例

```{webr}
plants <- read.csv("data/plant_growth.csv")

plot(
  plants$day,
  plants$height_cm,
  pch = 19,
  xlab = "Day",
  ylab = "Height (cm)",
  main = "Plant height"
)

hist(plants$height_cm, xlab = "Height (cm)", main = "Height distribution")

boxplot(
  height_cm ~ treatment,
  data = plants,
  xlab = "Treatment",
  ylab = "Height (cm)",
  main = "Height by treatment"
)

mean_height <- aggregate(height_cm ~ treatment, data = plants, FUN = mean)
barplot(
  mean_height$height_cm,
  names.arg = mean_height$treatment,
  xlab = "Treatment",
  ylab = "Mean height (cm)",
  main = "Mean height by treatment"
)

plot(plants$day, plants$height_cm, pch = 19, xlab = "Day", ylab = "Height (cm)")
abline(lm(height_cm ~ day, data = plants), col = "blue", lwd = 2)

control <- subset(plants, treatment == "control")
fertilized <- subset(plants, treatment == "fertilized")

control_mean <- aggregate(height_cm ~ day, data = control, FUN = mean)
fertilized_mean <- aggregate(height_cm ~ day, data = fertilized, FUN = mean)

plot(
  control_mean$day,
  control_mean$height_cm,
  type = "b",
  pch = 19,
  col = "steelblue",
  ylim = range(control_mean$height_cm, fertilized_mean$height_cm),
  xlab = "Day",
  ylab = "Mean height (cm)",
  main = "Mean height by treatment"
)
lines(
  fertilized_mean$day,
  fertilized_mean$height_cm,
  type = "b",
  pch = 17,
  col = "tomato",
  lwd = 2
)
legend(
  "topleft",
  legend = c("control", "fertilized"),
  col = c("steelblue", "tomato"),
  pch = c(19, 17),
  lwd = 2,
  bty = "n"
)
```
